{{CargoRelic
|name=Atlantis Crystal
|class_id=22284
|rank=SSS
|affct=FTH
|birthday=12-14
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.11%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.41%)
|description=On Dec 14, 1509 BC, the Stone of Atlantis was made to become the most important energy core of this legendary city.<br>Atlantis Crystals, as the central energy system of Atlantis, was once placed in its capital, the Sun Palace. Shaped like a huge transparent hexagonal prism, it absorbs sunlight and converts it into energy. It can also rejuvenate humans and regenerate their bodies, allowing the people of Atlantis to live a carefree life. But it exploded due to an inadvertent operation, shaking the foundation of the earth and directly causing the sinking of the subcontinent of Atlantis.
|fame=61
|art=75
|fth=109
|civ=51
|tech=66
|ss1=Snail ATK +30<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Steel Hall Base Effect +24%<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Silence Hall Base Effect +24%
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Steel Hall Base Effect +32%<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Silence Hall Base Effect +32%
|ss3=Snail ATK +50<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Steel Hall Base Effect +40%<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Silence Hall Base Effect +40%
|ss4=Snail ATK +70<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Steel Hall Base Effect +56%<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Silence Hall Base Effect +56%
|ss5=Snail ATK +90<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Steel Hall Base Effect +72%<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Silence Hall Base Effect +72%
|ss6=Snail ATK +120<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Steel Hall Base Effect +96%<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Silence Hall Base Effect +96%
|ss7=Snail ATK +120<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Steel Hall Base Effect +96%<br>In the Rebel Rocket Cabin:<br>> Silence Hall Base Effect +96%<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Blue Reagent Drops +6%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail ATK +600
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Blue Card Drops +6%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Lost kingdom|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Super Treasure Map, +200|orange}}
|3name=Atlantean Citizen|3rec=29.41M|3atk=127823|3def=85276|3hp=4687441|3weak=18885
|4name=Atlantean Soldier|4rec=40.57M|4atk=151352|4def=100973|4hp=6419306|4weak=20043
|5name=Atlantean Nobleman|5rec=52.80M|5atk=177146|5def=118181|5hp=8483260|5weak=22282
|6name=King of Atlantis|6rec=66.62M|6atk=206300|6def=137631|6hp=11164109|6weak=26882
|Arec=82.03M|Aatk=238794|Adef=159309|Ahp=14395080|Aweak=31263
}}}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Steel Hall Boost]]
[[Category:Silent Hall Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Reagent Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Wormhole Boost]]
[[Category:Rebel Rocket Cabin Boost]]
